response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks (including TDD and custom test runners), and containerization demonstrates strong architectural and operational skills. His open-source contributions and workshop leadership further highlight communication, collaboration, and passion for engineering excellence.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling
Strong testing culture with custom frameworks and TDD advocacy
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalents exist)
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Some roles use DLang or Ember.js, which are secondary to required stack
